filo_bolt.description:
- Remove unused WHEEL_SIDE constant and return value
- Bump version to 1.0.2
- Disable debug mode in config

filo_jack.description:
- Attach floor jacks to the left or right side of any vehicle
- Pump-by-pump lift
- Geometric roll calculation based on real wheel track width
- Automatic Z lift to prevent opposite-side wheel clipping
- Both sides can be jacked simultaneously
- Removing one jack while the other is active correctly resets the vehicle to the remaining jack's state
- `IsLifted` export for other resources to check jack state

filo_textui.description: - Refactor UI rendering and optimize resource codebase

filo_vehiclekeys.description:
- Simplify key handling and ignition state management
- Optimize UI updates and condition checking
- Improve code structure and maintainability across client/server
- Version updated to 1.3.3
